calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:22 am and concluding at 10:38 am.

Plaintiff Fedex Corporate Services Inc is represented by Arach Moussavian, Esq.
Defendant Chronos Fitness Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

CHARITY ROCHELLE is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

Court Finds:
1. The complaint filed September 17, 2020 is the operative pleading.
2. The Defendant was served by Personal service on January 08, 2021.
3. The Doe defendants were not dismissed on November 09, 2023.
4. There is insufficient documentation to show that Defendant was noticed of the amount of demand, the Court reduces the amount of damages from $25,181.52 to $23,328.46

Plaintiffs counsel makes Oral Motion to dismiss Doe Defendants.
The Court GRANTS Plaintiffs Oral Motion Re: Dismissal of Doe Defendants.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

The Curt confirms that the Judgment requested will resolve the entire matter.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff edex Corporate Services Inc, and against Defendant Chronos Fitness Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $23,328.46
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $564.00
4. Attorney Fees: $800.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $24,692.46

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2024 Continued To Jan-28-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-04-2024 Continued To Dec-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Chronos Fitness Inc., A SOS/FTB Forfeited California Corporation.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:23:49 a.m. and concluding at 9:34:07 a.m. (D505)

Teresia Sandhu, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff FedEx Corporate Services, Inc.
Defendant Chronos Fitness Inc., A SOS/FTB Forfeited California Corporation not appearing.
Charity Rochelle, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

The Court discusses the issues with counsel.
The Court cannot proceed. Plaintiff needs to provide more information or evidence in support for the request for judgment.
The Court refers counsel to Local Rule 6.6, CRC 3.110 and CCP 585-586.

The Court continues the matter for plaintiff cure issues. The matter is continued to December 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505.
